commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0a54cd2db58d1962e1f3752a90b647433cbc0053)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes the Go CLI's Windows bootstrap, Azure extension wait/delete retry helpers, and focused Go tests to improve Azure Windows desktop lease SSH/SFTP, OOBE, polling, cleanup, and diagnostics.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main and the PR diff show the direct CLI path is changed while the coordinator Worker path that provisions brokered Azure Windows leases still emits the old bootstrap and LRO behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor or maintainer revision plus real-environment proof; repair automation should not proceed because the required proof must come from a real setup.

target.title: fix(windows): make azure desktop leases reliable
target.body:
## Summary

Make fresh Azure Windows desktop leases reliably reach a usable interactive desktop and remain usable by SSH/SFTP consumers.

## Problem

The Azure Windows lease could be created successfully but still fail later because:

- OpenSSH had no working SFTP subsystem or host key, so modern `scp` uploads failed.
- Windows 11 first-logon/OOBE screens blocked automatic logon from reaching the desktop.
- Azure's extension LRO poller could remain pending after the extension resource reported `Succeeded`.
- VM cleanup could race managed disk detachment and leave disks behind.
- Remote PowerShell bootstrap failures were hidden behind only `exit status 1`.

## Changes

- Configure `Subsystem sftp internal-sftp`, generate an ED25519 host key, harden its ACLs, and verify `sshd` is running.
- Mark Windows 11 OOBE/privacy gates complete and set `DefaultDomainName` for local auto-logon desktop leases.
- Keep the Azure SDK extension poller as the primary signal while also accepting terminal extension resource state; extract this wait path for focused tests.
- Retry Azure managed disk deletion races such as `DiskInUse` and `DiskIsAttachedToVM`.
- Capture and print remote Windows bootstrap output when SSH bootstrap exits early.

## Validation

- `GOCACHE=/private/tmp/crabbox-go-cache mise exec -- go test ./internal/cli -run 'TestWaitForAzureExtension|TestIsAzureRetryableDeleteError|TestAWSUserDataWindowsProfile|TestAWSUserDataWindowsWSL2Profile'`
- `GOCACHE=/private/tmp/crabbox-go-cache mise exec -- go build -o /private/tmp/crabbox-asqa ./cmd/crabbox`
- Live Azure Windows validation: fresh VM provisioned, SSH/SFTP worked, interactive desktop became available, downstream runtime upload/bootstrap reached the test-driver phase, and VM/NIC/public IP/disk cleanup completed.

The full `go test ./internal/cli ./internal/providers/azure` run hit unrelated existing `TempDir RemoveAll cleanup: directory not empty` races in coordinator tests; the touched Windows/Azure tests passed.
target.author: fcoury-oai
